pqr_criteria.criteria: Vendor to provide separate cost for operating the unit for 1 year.
references: Source: RFQ water cooled Chiller Package for HVAC Revised Sept 2025.docx, Score: 0.7500

pqr_criteria.criteria: The complete scope includes Design, Engineering, Supply, Installation, Testing, and commissioning of a Chiller-Based Air Dehumidification system.
references: Source: RFQ water cooled Chiller Package for HVAC Revised Sept 2025.docx, Score: 0.3929

pqr_criteria.criteria: Cooling air must be delivered at 22 deg C and 45% RH to maintain the final product temperature.
references: Source: RFQ water cooled Chiller Package for HVAC Revised Sept 2025.docx, Score: 0.4444

pqr_criteria.criteria: Provide 2 working Water Cooled Chillers, each 300 TR, for a total of 600 TR refrigeration load.
references: Source: RFQ water cooled Chiller Package for HVAC Revised Sept 2025.docx, Score: 0.3929

pqr_criteria.criteria: Chiller compressor type must be Screw Compressor.
references: Source: RFQ water cooled Chiller Package for HVAC Revised Sept 2025.docx, Score: 0.4167

pqr_criteria.criteria: Chiller refrigerant must be R-134a, including the first charge of refrigerant and oil.
references: Source: RFQ water cooled Chiller Package for HVAC Revised Sept 2025.docx, Score: 0.4167

pqr_criteria.criteria: Chiller evaporator and condenser must be Shell & Tube type with SS 304 Tubes.
references: Source: RFQ water cooled Chiller Package for HVAC Revised Sept 2025.docx, Score: 0.4167

pqr_criteria.criteria: Layout must provide space for a future 3rd spare chiller.
references: Source: RFQ water cooled Chiller Package for HVAC Revised Sept 2025.docx, Score: 0.2159

pqr_criteria.criteria: Provide 1 induced draft Cooling Tower designed for 760 TR refrigeration load.
references: Source: RFQ water cooled Chiller Package for HVAC Revised Sept 2025.docx, Score: 0.4167

pqr_criteria.criteria: Cooling Tower must be constructed of FRP (Basin, Casing, Louvers) with PVC Fill and Eliminator.
references: Source: RFQ water cooled Chiller Package for HVAC Revised Sept 2025.docx, Score: 0.4167

pqr_criteria.criteria: Cooling Tower must be designed for a Wet Bulb Temperature of 29 Deg. C and provide a tower outlet temperature of 33 Deg. C.
references: Source: RFQ water cooled Chiller Package for HVAC Revised Sept 2025.docx, Score: 0.4167

pqr_criteria.criteria: Cooling Tower fan must be equipped with a VFD.
references: Source: RFQ water cooled Chiller Package for HVAC Revised Sept 2025.docx, Score: 0.4167

pqr_criteria.criteria: A chemical dosing system for the Cooling Tower is required.
references: Source: RFQ water cooled Chiller Package for HVAC Revised Sept 2025.docx, Score: 0.4167

pqr_criteria.criteria: Provide 1 Double Skin Air Handling Unit (AHU) with a supply air fan capacity of 53000 CFM.
references: Source: RFQ water cooled Chiller Package for HVAC Revised Sept 2025.docx, Score: 0.4167

pqr_criteria.criteria: AHU must deliver outlet air at 22+/-2 DegC with 45+/-2% Relative Humidity.
references: Source: RFQ water cooled Chiller Package for HVAC Revised Sept 2025.docx, Score: 0.4167

pqr_criteria.criteria: AHU must include a pre-filter section with 10-micron filters and a plug fan with VFD.
references: Source: RFQ water cooled Chiller Package for HVAC Revised Sept 2025.docx, Score: 0.4167

pqr_criteria.criteria: AHU cooling coil, casing, tubes, and header must be SS 304 with plain aluminum fins. Drain pan must be SS 304.
references: Source: RFQ water cooled Chiller Package for HVAC Revised Sept 2025.docx, Score: 0.4167

pqr_criteria.criteria: Provide 3 Chilled Water Pumps (2 Working + 1 Standby) and 3 Condenser Water Pumps (2W+1S), each suitable for 600 TR load.
references: Source: RFQ water cooled Chiller Package for HVAC Revised Sept 2025.docx, Score: 0.6000

pqr_criteria.criteria: Pump motors must be IE-3, TEFC sq. cage induction, class F.
references: Source: RFQ water cooled Chiller Package for HVAC Revised Sept 2025.docx, Score: 0.6000

pqr_criteria.criteria: Pump material of construction: Casing - Cast Iron, Impeller - SS, Shaft - EN8.
references: Source: RFQ water cooled Chiller Package for HVAC Revised Sept 2025.docx, Score: 0.6000

pqr_criteria.criteria: Vendor must provide engineering deliverables including PFD, P&ID, HAZOP, civil drawings, and equipment/material specifications.
references: Source: RFQ water cooled Chiller Package for HVAC Revised Sept 2025.docx, Score: 0.6667

pqr_criteria.criteria: Vendor must supply commissioning spares.

pqr_criteria.criteria: Vendor must provide a list of 2 Years maintenance spares.

pqr_criteria.criteria: Electrical power supply will be 415 V / 50 Hz / 3 Ph.
references: Source: RFQ water cooled Chiller Package for HVAC Revised Sept 2025.docx, Score: 0.3929

pqr_criteria.criteria: Components must be from the list of approved makes (e.g., Valves: L&T, KSB; PLC: Allen Bradley/Honeywell/Schneider; Cables: Polycab, KEC).
